# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

The following table lists actively supported versions of `symguard`. Only the latest release in the current major version line receives security patches.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| v0.1.x  | :white_check_mark: |
| < 0.1   | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

We take the security of `symguard` seriously. If you discover a security vulnerability, please report it through **GitHub's private vulnerability reporting**:

1. Go to [https://github.com/danieljustus/symaira-guard/security/advisories](https://github.com/danieljustus/symaira-guard/security/advisories)
2. Click **"New draft security advisory"**
3. Provide a detailed description, steps to reproduce, and — if possible — a proof of concept

Alternatively, you can email the maintainer directly at **security@danieljustus.dev** with the subject prefix `[symguard-security]`.

### What to expect

- You will receive an acknowledgment within **72 hours** of your report.
- We will work with you to understand the issue, reproduce it, and develop a fix.
- Once a fix is ready, we will coordinate a disclosure date and publish an advisory.

We ask that you **do not** publicly disclose the vulnerability before we have had a chance to address it and notify affected users.
